title: Everyday Bharat Objects — Level 1
tagline: Familiar Indian objects that make first vocabulary feel close to home.
description: Children discover objects they see in Indian homes and everyday life through pictures, stories and conversation. They identify, describe and connect each object to familiar experiences before flipping the card to learn more.
benefits: Builds vocabulary using culturally relevant objects
Develops identification, description and classification skills
Connects language learning with everyday Indian life

comparison.format: Double-sided laminated cards with rounded corners

themesIncluded: Indian household objects, festivals, traditions, values, vocabulary and storytelling.
